name: stockyard-anthrofit
description: Deep Anthropic compatibility layer. System prompt consolidation, max_tokens injection, tool schema translation, streaming normalization. Drop-in Claude support for OpenAI apps.

tools.name: anthrofit_stats
tools.description: Get translation statistics: requests processed, system prompts fixed, tools translated, errors.

tools.name: anthrofit_test
tools.description: Test OpenAI→Anthropic translation on a request without sending.

tools.name: anthrofit_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the AnthroFit proxy is running and healthy.
